title: Rocket Uniface Library 10.4
text: Rocket Uniface Library 10.4 This is the Uniface Library, the complete documentation for Rocket® Uniface , the most productive environment for building enterprise web, mobile, and desktop applications. Uniface also enables you to integrate multiple databases, technologies, and operating platforms. Note: Uniface is available in two editions—the Community Edition and the Enterprise Edition. This documentation covers both editions, so information that is applicable only to the Community Edition is clearly indicated. For information on the differences, see About Rocket Uniface .
